g.text: 1, Copie the new file to BucketDst.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2, Write a new active metadata record to TableT.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3, Queries how many backup copies already exist for the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4, If copies > 3 copies, the Replicator directly deletes the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: oldest backup object from S3 BucketDst.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5, At the same time, it deletes the corresponding metadata

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1, Read the original_key from the S3 event.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2, Queries TableT to find all backup copies associated with

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3, Does not delete the backup objects immediately.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Instead, it updates all active records for that file.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4, Changes their status from active to disowned.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5, Records the disowned_at timestamp for later cleanup.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6, It leaves the actual deletion of stale copies to the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1, Trigger by an EventBridge rule every 1 minute.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2, Calculate a time threshold of now - 10s.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3, Query the GSI on Table T to find copies (status: disowned & disowned_at: value >= threshold).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4, Identify those copies as stale backup copies that are safe to delete.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5, Delete the corresponding backup objects from BucketDst.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6, Delete the matched metadata rows from Table T.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 7, As a result, those stale copies will not appear in future queries.
